landing.title: Invest in Ukraine, for Ukrainians
landing.lead: Tell us how much you want to invest and get curated, catalog-grounded options from vetted Ukrainian banks and providers - in plain language.
landing.hint: Free tokens are granted after you verify your email.
landing.step1Body: Choose how much you want to invest and your currency, horizon and risk.
landing.step2Body: We match you against a transparent catalog of real providers - no hype.
landing.step3Body: Each option links to the official source. Each search costs one token.
landing.disclaimer: InvestGuideUA provides information only, not financial advice. Always verify details with the provider before investing.

register.sentLink: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
register.verifyToActivate: Verify your email to activate your account and receive your 5 free tokens. Tokens are granted only after verification.
register.didntGet: Didn't get it? In this MVP the verification link is written to the backend log.
register.subtitle: Register to get 5 free tokens after email verification.
register.passwordError: At least 8 characters, including a letter and a digit.
register.emailTaken: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
register.validationError: Please check your email and password and try again.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.success: Your email is verified. {{tokens}} have been added to your account.
verify.invalidHint: The link may be expired or already used. Register again to receive a fresh link.
verify.missing: No verification token was provided in the link.
verify.defaultError: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

search.title: Find ways to invest
search.intro: Enter an amount to get catalog-grounded options. Each search costs 1 token. You have {{balance}}.
search.goalsPlaceholder: e.g. stable income with low risk
search.errAdvisorBusy: The advisor is busy right now and no token was charged. Please try again shortly.
search.errRateLimited: Too many searches just now. Please wait a moment and try again.
search.errEmailNotVerified: You need to verify your email before searching.
search.errValidation: Please check your inputs and try again.

results.noOptions: No matching options for these inputs. Try a different amount, currency, or preferences.

history.title: Your search history
history.loadError: Could not load your history. Please try again.

historyDetail.notFoundBody: This search doesn't exist or isn't yours.
historyDetail.loadError: Could not load this search. Please try again.

providers.title: Provider catalog
providers.intro: These are the active providers our recommendations are drawn from. Recommendations never go outside this list. Figures are indicative - always confirm on the provider's official page.
providers.empty: No providers are listed right now.
providers.loadError: Could not load the provider catalog. Please try again.

account.title: Your account
account.deleteBody: We keep only what's needed to run your account. To request deletion of your account and associated data, send us a request and we'll process it.
account.deletionThanks: Thanks - we'll process your deletion request and confirm by email.
account.mailtoBody:
Please delete my InvestGuideUA account and associated data.

Account email: {{email}}

tokens.title: Buy tokens
tokens.intro: Each investment search costs 1 token. You currently have {{balance}}.
tokens.empty: No token packs are available right now.
tokens.fineprint: Payments are processed securely by monobank (Plata by mono). A fiscal receipt is emailed to you on success.
tokens.loadError: Could not load token packs. Please try again.

paymentResult.title: Payment status
paymentResult.pollingHint: This can take a few seconds.
paymentResult.failed: Your payment did not go through. No tokens were added and you were not charged.
paymentResult.processing: Still processing - we'll update your balance shortly. You can safely leave this page; your tokens will appear once the payment is confirmed.
paymentResult.missing: We couldn't find a payment to confirm. If you just paid, check your balance on the

notFound.title: 404 - Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist.

placeholder.body: This area is part of a later delivery milestone and is not built yet.

insufficientTokens.title: Out of tokens
insufficientTokens.message: You don't have enough tokens to run that search.

rateLimited.title: Slow down a moment
rateLimited.message: Too many requests just now. Please wait a little and try again.

emailNotVerified.title: Verify your email
emailNotVerified.message: Verify your email address to use this feature. Check your inbox for the link.

advisorUnavailable.title: Advisor is busy
advisorUnavailable.message: The advisor is unavailable right now and no token was charged. Please try again shortly.

validation.title: Check your input
validation.message: Some fields need attention. Please review and try again.

emailTaken.title: Email already registered
emailTaken.message: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.

unauthorized.title: Please sign in
unauthorized.message: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

forbidden.title: Not allowed
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to do that.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.message: We couldn't find what you were looking for.

payment.title: Payment problem
payment.message: We could not start that payment. Please try again.

network.title: Connection problem
network.message: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

default.title: Something went wrong
default.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
